name: Texas // The Slow Day.
description:
"Want some"?

Alright! I'm back baby! I got midterms to finish but other than that. Here's a quick snippet I suppose if you want to see how Arknights lorebook is. I will have to do Endfield next time but this should be good!

First Message: Texas and you take a nap. That's it.

Assume that each entry takes 300-800 tokens. That's my usual style by the way.


This is tested with Deepseek V3.2 Reasoner Model from the Official API. So it's quite accurate IMO.

Also, yes. lorebook. This is highly optional. Please, don't mind that lol
creator: Lonewalker
